case_title: DINUZZO, VANESSA VS LELAND, HERBERT TRUSTEE C/O WEST COAST PROPERTY et al

docket_entries.description: DEFT REQUEST FOR A CONTINUANCE SUBMITTED TO THE COMMISSIONER FOR APPROVAL. DATE REQUESTED: FRIDAY, MAY 28TH AT 3:30 PM. PAID $10 COURT FEE BY CHECK.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,542.90 FILED BY DINUZZO, VANESSA AS TO DEFENDANT LELAND, HERBERT TRUSTEE C/O WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LELAND, HERBERT TRUSTEE C/O WEST COAST PROPERTY
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAY-21-1999, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO MAY-28-1999 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DINUZZO, VANESSA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LELAND, HERBERT TRUSTEE C/O WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY WEST COAST PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY $2,542.90 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,588.90, DEFT. HERBERT LELAND (TRUSTEE) IS DESMISSED WITH- OUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEF'S CONTINUANCE REQUEST; MAILED OUT INFO RE: REQUIREMENTS & FEES;
